title: V1Filter
description: Hatchet V1Filter entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

id.description: the id of this resource, in UUID format

createdAt.description: the time that this resource was created

updatedAt.description: the time that this resource was last updated

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant associated with this filter.

workflowId.description: The workflow id associated with this filter.

scope.description: The scope associated with this filter. Used for subsetting candidate filters at evaluation time

expression.description: The expression associated with this filter.

payload.description: Additional payload data associated with the filter

isDeclarative.description: Whether the filter is declarative (true) or programmatic (false)
